mapper.select:
SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, m2.nickname, m1.email, NVL( (SELECT rem_point FROM point p2 WHERE p2.member_id = m1.member_id AND p2.point_id = ( SELECT MAX(p3.point_id) FROM point p3 WHERE p3.member_id = m1.member_id )), 0 ) AS remPoint, NVL( (SELECT SUM(point_amount) FROM point WHERE member_id = m1.member_id AND point_amount > 0), 0 ) AS totalEarned, NVL( (SELECT ABS(SUM(point_amount)) FROM point WHERE member_id = m1.member_id AND point_amount < 0), 0 ) AS totalUsed, TO_CHAR( (SELECT MAX(reg_date) FROM point WHERE member_id = m1.member_id), 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AS lastChangeDate FROM member1 m1 JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m1.member_id WHERE m1.status != '4' AND m2.nickname != '(탈퇴)'
AND (m1.login_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m2.nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY remPoint DESC

SELECT p.point_id AS pointId, p.member_id AS memberId, p.order_id AS orderId, p.change_reason AS changeReason, p.point_amount AS pointAmount, p.rem_point AS remPoint, TO_CHAR(p.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate FROM point p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId}
AND p.reg_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.reg_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY p.point_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point ( point_id, member_id, order_id, change_reason, point_amount, rem_point, reg_date ) VALUES ( point_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{orderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changeReason}, #{pointAmount}, #{remPoint}, SYSDATE )
